title: assistant_message carries per-turn usage and cost; the run reduces to nonzero totals
description: Per spec, the agent publishes per-turn deltas on each assistant_message (avp.usage + avp.cost_usd) and NO cumulative totals on agent_stopped; the consumer reduces the stream. This case folds the stream (the harness final_state does this) and asserts the totals are present and nonzero: at least one input/output token, and a computed cost greater than zero (the bundled price table resolves the model). A tiny positive floor is used so the assertion means 'cost was actually computed', not an exact figure (real-LLM token counts vary).

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
